_comment: Known false positive — quiet summer day, VIX 12.68 against a calm window (median 14.54). ECDF rank-within-quiet-regime emits 0.90 (top decile by rank) while trader truth is ~0: nothing happened, VIX drifted inside its normal range. Same pathology as market_data_vix_low_vol_regime_2017_10_05 in a less extreme regime. xfail(strict=True) pins the gap; flips green when a noise-zone gate (absolute-magnitude / vol-of-vol / window-spread filter) is added to SRS CLS-001.

expected_band.rationale_pending_trader: Trader-band, not SRS-formula-band. Window median=14.54, |deviation|=|12.68-14.54|=1.86. 18 of 20 history |deviations from median| are ≤ 1.86 → SRS CLS-001 ECDF rank = 0.90. But this is a known false positive: a calm summer day with VIX drifting below its window mean is not a tradeable signal. A straddle bought on this severity bleeds theta. Trader-defensible severity ≤ 0.20 reflects the regime: calm window, no event, no signal. The test FAILS today and stays failing until a noise-zone gate (absolute-magnitude / vol-of-vol / window-spread filter) lands in SRS CLS-001 — by design.
